title: VoiceTranscriptFileSearchState
description: File path hit list for voice navigation (parallel to workspace search). JSON key remains fileSelection. An empty object {} means enter file-selection mode before any hits exist.

results.description: Numbered file path hits for voice navigation (parallel to workspace search hits).

closed.description: True when the file-selection list session ended without a new hit list.

noHits.description: True when a file path query ran successfully but returned zero matches.
